question: What areas do you serve?
answer: MTC Renovations serves Burlington, Hamilton, Oakville, Stoney Creek, Ancaster, Dundas, Waterdown, Grimsby, and Milton as our primary service area. We also regularly work in Mississauga, Brampton, and the greater Toronto area. If you are unsure whether we serve your neighbourhood, give us a call at (647) 560-1095 or fill out our free quote form — we will let you know right away. We are a local Ontario team, not a franchise, so you always deal directly with our crew.
